description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode came to an abrupt stop on Geary Boulevard just after turning left from 
northbound Masonic Avenue in San Francisco, and was rear ended by a passenger vehicle (Vehicle 2) traveling directly behind it. The Zoox 
vehicle operator disengaged from autonomy after the impact. There were no reported injuries, and police were not called. The Zoox vehicle 
was towed from the scene and was found to have sustained moderate damage to its rear end.
Print
Clear Form
